title: myrtaceae
intro: The Myrtaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, commonly known as myrtle or eucalyptus families. It is a diverse group of plants that includes over 150 genera and approximately 6,000 species. The Myrtaceae family is characterized by its distinctive flowers, often with a cluster of small, fragrant blooms, and its ability to thrive in various environments, from tropical to temperate regions. Many species within this family are valued for their aromatic properties, timber, and ornamental value, making them popular in gardens and landscaping projects.
